description:
Google Chrome, offline installer, for all users.

        This installs Chrome for all users, using the (eventual) download URL afer
        following the "Alternate installer for all user accounts" link and
        deselecting "collect usage statistics" from the 
        "Althernate (offline) Google Chrome installer (Windows) page" at 
        "http://support.google.com/installer/bin/answer.py?hl=en&answer=126299".

        This was created to support our packages for the selenium
        automated web testing system.
summary: Google Chrome Offline Installer- for all users
author: Many
